cost_components_summary: Indicative non-commodity CO2 transport cost placeholder. Network routing, compression energy and hub utilisation are not yet represented.
input_basis_notes: No commodity input is attached in the minimum placeholder. Compression and shipping energy should be added when a network representation is authored.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct emissions are zero in this placeholder. Transport handles captured CO2 flow and does not create removals.
rollout_limit_notes: No rollout limit is calibrated; zero demand anchor prevents forced activity in default runs.
availability_conditions: Available as a topology placeholder in all milestone years; scenario authors should review before relying on quantities.
evidence_summary: Carbon-management placeholders draw on CCS and removals uncertainty framing rather than facility-level Australian network evidence.
derivation_method: Minimum viable placeholder preserving topology and upgrade path without forcing baseline activity.
review_notes: Low-confidence placeholder for visibility and process-chain migration only; not a calibrated infrastructure model.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into pipeline corridors, shipping, compression, hub aggregation and regional storage-network constraints.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Maps to CO2 transport arcs or network processes between capture nodes and storage sinks in TIMES or VEDA-style models.
